title: doellingeria scabra
intro: Doellingeria scabra, also known as rough-leaved false goldenrod, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and its anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used to treat coughs, colds, and bronchitis due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties, promoting the clearance of mucus and phlegm from the respiratory system. Herbal preparations of Doellingeria scabra typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used in syrups and tinctures.
